nodes.label: Guitar Dark Mode Icon
nodes.description: Close-up photograph of a guitar fretboard with strings and fret markers, shot against a dark/black background. Dark-themed photographic asset used as a dark-mode variant icon or background image for the guitar instrument in the HSM Management frontend.
nodes.visual_content: guitar fretboard close-up, dark background, warm wood tones, gold/brass fret wires and dot inlays
